key_takeaway: With 79 properties in the UK, White Stays is in the sweet spot where Boom delivers the highest impact — automating the operational grind so your team can focus on growth and guest experience.
summary_bullets: 79 UK properties means you're competing in one of Europe's most mature STR markets — Boom's dynamic pricing and AI guest comms give you an edge over operators still doing things manually
UK operators using Boom (Zzzing, Perch, Housepitality, PureServiced) are seeing 20-30% efficiency gains and faster growth — we know this market inside out
At 79 listings, you're at the inflection point — the right platform now means you can scale to 150+ without proportionally growing your team

discussion_points.title: Running 79 Properties in the UK
items: UK's competitive STR market requires sharp pricing — manual adjustments can't keep up with demand fluctuations
Guest expectations are high — response times directly impact reviews and Airbnb rankings
Coordinating cleaning and maintenance across 79 units with tight turnovers
Multiple disconnected tools creating data silos and manual work
Growing the portfolio while keeping service quality high

discussion_points.title: How Boom Solves This
items: Dynamic pricing engine — AI-powered rates that adjust across all 79 listings in real-time
BAM-powered guest communication — instant, intelligent responses 24/7 while maintaining your brand voice
Automated task management — turnovers, maintenance, and inspections triggered by bookings
One unified platform replacing your entire tech stack — everything in one dashboard
Real-time owner reporting and trust accounting built in

discussion_points.title: Growth Opportunities
items: Join a strong UK Boom community — Zzzing (360 props), Perch (300), Housepitality (140), PureServiced (71) are all on the platform
Direct booking channel to reduce OTA dependency
Scale to 150+ properties without doubling your ops team

demo_highlights.benefit: 79 listings priced optimally, automatically. UK event awareness, seasonal adjustments, and competitor tracking — all handled by AI.
BAM handles routine guest messages instantly. Your team focuses on the exceptions that actually need a human touch.
Cleaning and maintenance auto-assigned from bookings. Every turnover tracked and verified. No more WhatsApp chaos.
Join the largest UK community of Boom-powered operators. Shared learnings, UK-specific features, and a platform built for your market.
